title: KLF x KFF
description: Make KFF works with KLF on 1.20.1 Forge
body:
## KLF x KFF
  
This mod is resolving crash when installing KLF(KotlinLangForge) and KFF(KotlinForForge) at the same time in Forge 1.20.1.  
And allowing the KFF API working as well.  
So that the developer can use latest Kotlin API with KotlinLangForge
